docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLMES, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT GOOD VIEW ROOFING & BUILDING SUPPLY CORPORAION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMES, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOOD VIEW ROOFING & BUILDING SUPPLY CORPORAION $5,030.14 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,110.14
